title: astragalus tmoleus
intro: Astragalus tmoleus, also known as Astragalus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus tmoleus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus tmoleus can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea by steeping the dried root in hot water.
